items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month, underperforming the Zacks Chemical - Diversified industry and the S&P 500's declines of 6.7% and 0.1%, respectively. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the ALB stock lately. Lithium prices have pu

items.headline: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $205 From $264
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $211.44, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: The U.S. Is Increasing Efforts to Rebuild Its Rare Earth Supply Chain
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) broadens the lens from rare earths to critical minerals generally. It's the world's largest lithium producer. First-quarter 2026 adjusted EBITDA jumped 148% year over year to $664 million as lithium prices rebounded from 2025 lows.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Shares of Albemarle (NYSE: ALB) are flat so far this year, thanks to an oversupply of lithium and a flattened demand for electric vehicles (EVs) in the United States. However, the long-term need for this critical metal is projected to increase 353% by the end of the decade, accor

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. RBC stated it now expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8 billio

items.headline: Albemarle's EBITDA to Benefit From Higher Lithium Prices, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle's (ALB) earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization, or EBITDA, will likely benefit from stronger lithium prices in the range of low to mid-$20s per kilogram, RBC Capital Markets analysts said. Analysts retained an outperform rating on the stock and
